name: Top-Down Shooter
description: A top-down twin-stick shooter with player movement, aiming, projectile spawning, enemy waves, and collision-based damage. Targets canvas 2D or Three.js orthographic.

requiredElements.name: player-movement
requiredElements.description: WASD movement with mouse aim; player rotates toward cursor.

requiredElements.name: projectile-system
requiredElements.description: Bullet spawning on click, pooled projectile array, lifetime/fade.

requiredElements.name: enemy-waves
requiredElements.description: Spawning enemies in increasing waves from screen edges.

requiredElements.name: collision-damage
requiredElements.description: Circle-circle collision between bullets/enemies/player with damage events.

requiredElements.name: score-hud
requiredElements.description: Score, wave number, and health displayed in HUD overlay.

optionalElements.name: screen-shake
optionalElements.description: Camera shake on player damage and explosions.

optionalElements.name: particle-explosions
optionalElements.description: Explosion particles on enemy death with additive blending.

optionalElements.name: power-ups
optionalElements.description: Dropped power-ups: rapid fire, spread shot, shield.

optionalElements.name: boss-fight
optionalElements.description: Wave 10 boss with multiple attack patterns.

qualityRules.description: Aiming is precise, crosshair visible, no input lag.
Screen shake on hit, muzzle flash, enemy flash on damage, explosion particles.
Wave difficulty scales smoothly; no sudden impossible spikes.
Bullets and enemies are object-pooled — no per-frame allocation.
Collision detection is O(n*m) or better with spatial hashing for 100+ entities.
HUD is readable, not obstructing gameplay, updates in real-time.
Neon/glow aesthetic with additive particles and clear entity silhouettes.
Bullet speed and enemy movement use delta time.

antiPatterns.description: Creating new bullet objects every shot causes GC stutter under rapid fire.
Shooting has no visual feedback — feels like the gun does nothing.
O(n^2) collision check for 200+ entities — drops framerate.
Enemies are single-color squares with no death animation.

improvementSuggestions.description: Pool bullets and enemies in pre-allocated arrays with active flags.
Add a 50ms muzzle flash sprite at the gun tip on every shot.
Add additive glow to bullets and enemies for neon aesthetic.

exampleOutputs.label: Object pool pattern
